title: South Cambridgeshire District Council: Best Value Notice (May 2024)
body: "On 8 May 2024 a Best Value Notice was reissued to South Cambridgeshire District Council as a formal notification that the department had ongoing concerns regarding the council and requesting that the council engages with the department to provide further assurance of improvement.  On 8 November 2024 the authority was informed that the Notice would not be reissued. "
